Source: Loading... Press M to open stage select.
Example: Shown while the client UI is waiting for a stage.
en-us: Loading... Press M to open stage select.
ja-jp: 読み込み中です... Mキーでステージ選択を開けます。

Example: Title at the top of the stage select menu.
Toast after selecting a stage. {stage} is the localized stage name.
Clear reward toast. {xp} and {coins} are numbers.

Source: Already cleared. Moving to the next training.
Example: Shown when clearing a stage that already gave rewards.
en-us: Already cleared. Moving to the next training.
ja-jp: クリア済みです。次の練習へ進みます。

Example: Target hit toast. {hit} and {total} are numbers.

Source: WASD: Move    Mouse: Look    Click: Target    Shift: Sprint    Ctrl: Crouch    M: Menu
en-us: WASD: Move    Mouse: Look    Click: Target    Shift: Sprint    Ctrl: Crouch    M: Menu
ja-jp: WASD: 移動    マウス: 見る    クリック: 的を押す    Shift: 走る    Ctrl: しゃがむ    M: メニュー

Example: Progress text shown when touching a checkpoint.
Progress text shown after touching a hazard.
Progress text shown after finishing arena targets.

Source: Press W to move forward, turn with the mouse, and reach the yellow goal.
en-us: Press W to move forward, turn with the mouse, and reach the yellow goal.
ja-jp: Wで前に進み、マウスで向きを変えて、黄色いゴールへ行こう。

Source: Put the crosshair on the targets and click them. Clear all 10 targets.
en-us: Put the crosshair on the targets and click them. Clear all 10 targets.
ja-jp: 画面中央の照準を的に合わせてクリックしよう。10個でクリアです。

Source: Press Space to jump over steps and gaps, then reach the yellow goal.
en-us: Press Space to jump over steps and gaps, then reach the yellow goal.
ja-jp: Spaceでジャンプして、低い段差と小さな穴を越えて黄色いゴールへ行こう。

Source: Click 5 slowly moving targets. Take your time.
en-us: Click 5 slowly moving targets. Take your time.
ja-jp: ゆっくり動く的を5個クリックしよう。あせらなくて大丈夫です。
Stage 5: 危険を避ける練習

Source: Avoid the red floor. Green pads are checkpoints.
en-us: Avoid the red floor. Green pads are checkpoints.
ja-jp: 赤い床を避けて進もう。緑の床に乗ると、そこからやり直せます。

Source: Hold Shift and W to sprint down the long path to the yellow goal.
en-us: Hold Shift and W to sprint down the long path to the yellow goal.
ja-jp: Shiftを押しながらWで走ろう。長い道を進んで黄色いゴールへ行きます。

Source: Press Ctrl once to crouch and pass through the low tunnel. Press it again to stand.
en-us: Press Ctrl once to crouch and pass through the low tunnel. Press it again to stand.
ja-jp: Ctrlを1回押してしゃがみ、低いトンネルを通ろう。もう1回押すと立ちます。
Stage 8: 走って止まって狙う練習

Source: Sprint down the corridor, stop on the blue area, then click 3 targets.
en-us: Sprint down the corridor, stop on the blue area, then click 3 targets.
ja-jp: Shiftで長い通路を走り、青い停止エリアで止まってから的を3個クリックしよう。
Stage 9: ジャンプして狙う練習

Source: Jump across the platforms. The targets appear when you reach the final blue pad.
en-us: Jump across the platforms. The targets appear when you reach the final blue pad.
ja-jp: Spaceで足場をジャンプして進もう。最後の青い台に乗ると、奥の的が出ます。
Stage 10: トレーニングアリーナ

Source: In a wide obstacle arena, click and destroy 4 autonomous training robots.
en-us: In a wide obstacle arena, click and destroy 4 autonomous training robots.
ja-jp: 障害物のある広い部屋で、自律走行ロボットを4体クリックして破壊しよう。
